title: JavaScript Developer (mid) (Remote)
description:
HintEd is a cutting-edge Digital Adoption Platform that helps companies increase productivity by streamlining employee training and user onboarding for enterprise software. As a winner of the Start-Up Chile Program and holder of several global awards as the best HR Tech Solution, HintEd offers on-screen tutorials that guide users step-by-step through tasks within the web and/or Windows applications.

We are seeking a talented Middle JavaScript Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate will have experience with our tech stack, including HTML 5, CSS3, Javascript/Typescript, vue.js, Git, and Webpack/Vite.

Key Responsibilities:
вЂў Develop and maintain web applications using HTML 5, CSS3, Javascript/Typescript, vue.js, Git, and Webpack/Vite
вЂў Collaborate with the team to improve development processes and implement best practices
вЂў Troubleshoot and debug issues as they arise
вЂў Ensure code quality through automated testing
вЂў Keep up-to-date with new technologies and trends in web development

Requirements:
вЂў Strong experience with HTML 5, CSS3, Javascript/Typescript, vue.js, Git, and Webpack/Vite
вЂў Understanding of extensions for Google Chrome and requirements for Manifest 2/3
вЂў Experience in testing with a focus on automated end-to-end quality
вЂў Strong problem-solving and debugging skills
вЂў Good communication and collaboration skills
description_short: HintEd is seeking a talented Middle JavaScript Developer with experience in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/TypeScript, Vue.js, Git, and Webpack/Vite.

title: Web Developer (OpenCart/Storefront Maintenance)
description:
Carefast is looking for someone familiar with OpenCart and/or other online storefront platforms to help maintain and improve the store site. This would be on an as-needed basis (contract/freelance).

Responsibilities:
вЂў Communicate with management team in a timely manner regarding site issues
вЂў Including, but not limited to: Site outages, functionality, performance
вЂў Monthly meeting (paid) to discuss on-going tasks and areas for store improvement

Qualifications:
вЂў Must be familiar with OpenCart store platform and HTML
вЂў Experience with other online retail platforms strongly preferred, but not required

Benefits:
вЂў Flexible schedule
вЂў People with a criminal record are encouraged to apply
description_short: Carefast is looking for someone familiar with OpenCart and/or other online storefront platforms to help maintain and improve the store site.

title: IT Support Technician
description: About Avalere Health United by one profound purpose: to reach EVERY PATIENT POSSIBLE. At Avalere Health, we ensure every patient is identified, treated, supported, and cared for. Equally. Our Advisory, Medical, and Marketing teams come together вЂ“ powerfully and intentionally вЂ“ to forge unconventional connections, building a future where healthcare is not a barrier and no patient is left behind. Achieving our mission starts with providing enriching, purpose-driven careers for our team that empower them to make a tangible impact on patient lives. We are committed to creating a culture where our employees are empowered to bring their whole selves to work and tap into the power of diverse backgrounds and skillsets to play a part in making a difference for every patient, everywhere. Our flexible approach to working allows our global teams to decide where they want to work, whether in-office or at home based on team and client need. Major city hubs in London, Manchester, Washington, D.C., and New York, and smaller offices globally, serve as collaboration hubs allowing our teams to come together when it matters. Homeworkers are equally supported, with dedicated social opportunities and resources. Our inclusive culture is at the heart of everything we do. We proudly support our employees in bringing their whole selves to work with our six Employee Network Groups вЂ“ Diverse Ability, Family, Gender, LGBTQ+, Mental Health, and Race/Ethnicity. These groups provide opportunities to promote diversity, equity, and inclusion and to connect, learn, and socialise through regular meetings and programs of activity. We are an accredited Fertility Friendly employer with our Fertility Policy, enhanced parental leave, and culture of flexibility ensuring every employee feels supported across their family planning journey and can work in a way that suits their familyвЂ™s needs. We are deeply invested in supporting professional growth for our employees through day-to-day career experiences, access to thousands of on-demand training sessions, regular career conversations, and the opportunity for global, cross-capability career moves. We take pride in being part of the Disability Confident Scheme. This helps make sure you can be interviewed fairly if you have a disability, long term health condition, or are neurodiverse. If you'd like to apply and need adjustments made, you can let us know in your application. About the Role (On-site in our London Office) The IT Support Technician role will provide onsite and remo
description_short: About Avalere Health United by one profound purpose: to reach EVERY PATIENT POSSIBLE. At Avalere Health, we ensure every patient is identified, treated, supported, and cared for. Equally. Our Advisory, Medical, and Marketing teams come together вЂ“ powerfully and intentionally вЂ“ to forge unconventional connections, building a future where healthcare is not a barrier and no patient is left behind.

title: Software engineer
description: Sticker Mule is building the Internet's most lucrative commerce platform by combining software, manufacturing, and AI into one fully integrated stack. No print company, or pure software company for that matter, can match what we're doing. We're privately owned, profitable, and doing 9-figures in annual revenue with no meddlesome investors. How we work Small, autonomous teams that own products end-to-end. Prioritize what matters right now and pivot instantly when needed. Ship across web and mobile from the same codebase. We use Go, TypeScript, React, Expo, GraphQL, Postgres, and run on GCP. Use AI aggressively to push the limit of what we can do. Move fast, build for the masses, and deprioritize edge cases. Fully remote from 40+ countries and collaborate using Asana and Slack. Requirements You are an exceptional full-stack software engineer. You use AI aggressively and write well in English. What you will work on You'll help build and scale Sticker Mule Pro вЂ” a suite of software tools for creators and businesses: Stores (Shopify alternative) AI tools (internal and customer-facing) Notify (Mailchimp alternative) Reply (Zendesk alternative) Hire Me (Contra alternative) Mobile apps Compensation Salary: $150,000вЂ“$250,000 USD $20,000 signing bonus 4 weeks vacation + country-specific holidays Fully remote
description_short: Sticker Mule is building the Internet's most lucrative commerce platform by combining software, manufacturing, and AI into one fully integrated stack. No print company, or pure software company for that matter, can match what we're doing. We're privately owned, profitable, and doing 9-figures in annual revenue with no meddlesome investors. title: Capture Analyst
description: At Altarum , we work at the intersection of strategy, health impact, and innovation. We help public sector and health-focused organizations solve complex challenges that improve lives and strengthen communities. WeвЂ™re looking for a highly organized, analytical, and proactive Capture Analyst to help strengthen how we identify, prepare for, and pursue strategic business development opportunities. This is a great role for someone who enjoys bringing structure to complexity, supporting cross-functional teams, conducting research, and helping important opportunities move forward before the proposal stage begins. \n About the Role As a Capture Analyst , youвЂ™ll support the operational backbone of AltarumвЂ™s capture efforts across multiple divisions. YouвЂ™ll help coordinate workflows, conduct market and competitive research, maintain capture documentation and CRM data, support pipeline visibility, and keep teams organized throughout the opportunity lifecycle. This role is focused primarily on the pre-RFP stage, the work that happens before a request for proposals is released and before proposal writing begins. YouвЂ™ll help teams better understand upcoming opportunities, prepare earlier, track key actions, and make more informed pursuit decisions. This is not a traditional sales role or capture ownership role . Instead, it is a high-impact c oordination, intelligence, and enablement position for someone energized by research, organization, process improvement, and mission-driven growth. What You'll Do Support active capture efforts through coordination, tracking, documentation, and follow-through across multiple workstreams and stakeholders. Conduct market, agency, and competitive intelligence research to support opportunity identification, qualification, strategic positioning, and advance preparation. Partner with Proposal and Opportunity Management team members to support early review and pre-qualification of future or forecasted opportunities. Maintain pipeline and capture documentation, workflows, and opportunity data within CRM platforms; experience with Zoho CRM is a plus. <li data-section-id="1u3pt48"

title: Warehouse Utility I
description: The Warehouse Utility I is a versatile General Laborer responsible for supporting various departments to meet their goals while operating with incredible consistency and detail, adapting to changing needs. This role will perform an array of production and operational tasks, from pallet repairs and sorting, loading and unloading trailers, to facility maintenance, based on the daily needs of the location.
description_short: The Warehouse Utility I is a versatile General Laborer responsible for supporting various departments to meet their goals while operating with incredible consistency and detail, adapting to changing needs.

title: Associate Website Designer
description:
Miles IT is looking for an enthusiastic and collaborative Associate Website Designer to join our Associate program in our Marketing division. You will work closely with our developers, bringing website visions to life through Figma mockups, producing versatile design assets with Adobe tools, and contributing to the maintenance of our WordPress websites. This 3-Month Associate program is an exciting opportunity for candidates looking to start their career in marketing!

Responsibilities:
вЂў Create mockups for website projects in WordPress
вЂў Create assets such as slide decks and letterheads using Microsoft and Google tools
вЂў Create advertising graphics, social media images, e-guides/whitepapers, and email graphics
вЂў Use Figma as the primary mockup tool for website designs
вЂў Work with Adobe programs including Photoshop, InDesign, and Illustrator
вЂў Use AI tools for efficient editing and idea generation using Gemini, Photoshop, and Figma
вЂў Curate design examples and mood boards to establish creative direction
description_short: Miles IT is looking for an enthusiastic Associate Website Designer for a 3-Month Associate program. Work with developers on Figma mockups, Adobe design assets, and WordPress websites.
